hero.title: Your AniTrend Hub
hero.description: Jump back into the anime you care about, open your lists in app, and explore curated filters in one place.

appShortcuts.title: Open the app where it fits best
appShortcuts.description: Jump into the native AniTrend surfaces that work best on mobile while keeping web discovery one tap away.

profile.description: Pick up your lists, progress, and watch status in the native app.

discover.description: Open AniTrend's native discovery view when you want a mobile-first browse session.

suggestions.description: Jump straight into curated AniTrend suggestions without leaving the dashboard trail.

social.description: Continue into AniTrend's social feed and community-focused mobile surfaces.

settings.description: Open AniTrend settings on mobile for account and app-level preferences.

topAiring.title: Top Airing
topAiring.description: Currently airing series ranked by popularity

upcoming.title: Upcoming
upcoming.description: Shows releasing soon to add to your list

moviesOnly.title: Movies Only
moviesOnly.description: Feature-length titles for a single sitting
